slides.heading: IRhevholusjeni Yezimboni eBrithani neSewula ye-Afrika
slides.lead: Indlela isitimu, iimfemtri namadorobho okwatjhugulula ngayo iBrithani - nendlela loyo mrhu wetjhuguluko owafika ngayo eSewula ye-Afrika.

image.alt: Ifemtri enemitjhingayo emide ethunqisa umsi eduze nesitimela sesitimu, ngaphasi kwesibhakabhaka esinombala oorenji onomsi.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#efe7d8'/><rect y='128' width='320' height='52' fill='#8c7a5c'/><rect x='40' y='70' width='90' height='58' fill='#5a4a37'/><rect x='58' y='30' width='16' height='40' fill='#3f342a'/><rect x='92' y='38' width='16' height='32' fill='#3f342a'/><circle cx='66' cy='24' r='12' fill='#cfc3ad' opacity='0.8'/><circle cx='100' cy='30' r='10' fill='#cfc3ad' opacity='0.8'/><rect x='170' y='96' width='96' height='32' rx='5' fill='#7a1f1f'/><rect x='176' y='78' width='30' height='20' fill='#5c1414'/><circle cx='188' cy='132' r='12' fill='#2f2a24'/><circle cx='248' cy='132' r='12' fill='#2f2a24'/><rect x='150' y='124' width='120' height='6' fill='#4a4033'/><circle cx='262' cy='46' r='24' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Thoma ngokubuza abafundi bona ngimiphi imitjhini neenthabiso abazisebenzisa qobe langa ezitlhoga iimfemtri, igezi namkha iphethroli bona zibe khona. Hlathulula iingcenye ezimbili zesihloko: kokuthoma iRhevholusjeni Yezimboni eyathoma eBrithani, bese indlela isidingo seenthako ezingakalungiswa, iimmaraga nabasebenzi esadonsa ngayo iSewula ye-Afrika ngephakathi ephasini elifanako lezimboni - khulukhulu ngamadayimani negolide. Chaza igama elithi 'irhevholusjeni' njengetjhuguluko elirhabako khulu, elidephileko, endleleni abantu abaphila begodu basebenza ngayo.

slides.heading: Bekuyini iRhevholusjeni Yezimboni?
slides.lead: Ukusukela hlangana neminyaka yabo-1760, iBrithani yatjhuguluka isuka ekwenzeni izinto ngezandla iya ekuzenzeni ngemitjhini eemfemtrini.

blocks.text: **IRhevholusjeni Yezimboni** bekusikhathi, esathoma eBrithani hlangana neminyaka yabo-1700, lapha imitjhini emitjha nemithombo emitjha yamandla yavumela abantu bona benze izinto ngokurhabako begodu ngobunengi obukhulu kunangaphambili. Umsebenzi wakhamba usuka emakhaya nematlelweni amancani uya eemfemtrini ezikhulu.

items: Ngaphambili: inengi labantu belilima umhlaba begodu lenza izinto ngezandla ekhaya.
Ngemva: abantu abanengi basebenza imitjhini eemfemtrini emadorobheni namadorobheni amakhulu.
IBrithani yarhola ngombana beyinamalahle, insimbi, imali yokutjala neendlela zokurhweba embusweni wayo.

slides.notes: Gandelela ukuraga netjhuguluko. Abantu bebahlala benza amalaphu, amathulusi neembiza - kodwana ngezandla nangobunengi obuncani. IRhevholusjeni beyisebukhulwini nasejubaneni. Yethula umbono wokobana ukuthoma phambili kweBrithani kwabekelwe ngokwengcenye emnothweni neenthakweni ezingakalungiswa ezathathwa emakolonini wayo aphetjheya kwelwandle, okuyinto eqakathekako lokha nasifika eSewula ye-Afrika.

slides.heading: Amandla wesitimu
slides.lead: Injini yesitimu yanikela iimfemtri umthombo wamandla onamandla, othembekako, ongathembeli emilanjeni namkha emmoyeni.

blocks.text: Imitjhini yokuthoma beyiqhutjhwa mavili wamanzi, ngalokho iimfemtri bekufuze zakhiwe eduze nemilambo erhabako. Hlangana neminyaka yabo-1760 nabo-1770 unjiniyela weSkotlandi **James Watt** wathuthukisa khulu **injini yesitimu**, ebeyitjhisa amalahle bona ibilise amanzi begodu iqhube imitjhini. Nje ifemtri beyingakhiwa nanyana kuphi.

items: Iinjini zesitimu bezimpompa amanzi asuka emigodini emidephileko yamalahle neyensimbi.
Zanikela amandla imitjhini yokusonta neyokuluka eemfemtrini zamalaphu.
Ngokukhamba kwesikhathi zaqhuba izitimela neenkepe, zithutha izinto nabantu ngokurhabako.

image.alt: Ibhoyila lenjini yesitimu eline-piston nevili elikhulu eliphendukako, kunyuka isitimu.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#efe7d8'/><rect x='30' y='78' width='70' height='48' rx='6' fill='#6b3a2e'/><rect x='40' y='60' width='14' height='18' fill='#4a281f'/><circle cx='47' cy='52' r='9' fill='#cfc3ad' opacity='0.85'/><circle cx='58' cy='42' r='7' fill='#cfc3ad' opacity='0.7'/><rect x='100' y='96' width='36' height='10' fill='#7a5a3a'/><circle cx='168' cy='101' r='34' fill='none' stroke='#3f342a' stroke-width='8'/><circle cx='168' cy='101' r='6' fill='#3f342a'/><rect x='30' y='126' width='150' height='8' fill='#4a4033'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yenza isayensi ibe lula: tjhisa amanzi abe sisitimu, isitimu siphuqela i-piston, i-piston iphendula ivili eliqhuba imitjhini. Ikululeko eqakathekileko injini kaWatt eyayinikelako beyiyindawo - iimfemtri bezingasatlhogi ukuhlala emlanjeni. Hlanganisa nangaphambili: amalahle, iphethroli ebeliondla injini yesitimu, aba yenye yeemboni ezakhula ngokurhabako khulu.

slides.heading: Ihlelo lefemtri
slides.lead: Imitjhini, abasebenzi namahora amisiweko kwabuthelelwa ndawonye ngaphasi kophahla linye.

blocks.heading: Imitjhini
blocks.text: Imitjhini emikhulu enamandla beyenza ngemizuzu lokho okwakuthatha umsebenzi amahora ngezandla.

blocks.heading: Iwatjhi
blocks.text: Abasebenzi bekufuze bafike ngesikhathi begodu basebenze iinifthi ezide, ezimisiweko ezibekwa yibhela lefemtri.

blocks.heading: Iimholo
blocks.text: Abantu abasazenzanga izinto zoke; babhadelwa umholo bona benze umsebenzi munye omncani ilanga loke.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa amakarada la amathathu ukuhlathulula bona bekuyini okutjha ngomsebenzi wefemtri: ukuziphatha ngewatjhi, ukwahlukaniswa komsebenzi ube misebenzi emincani ephindaphindwako, nokuthembela emholweni kunomhlaba namkha ubungcweti. Buza abafundi bona bamadanise lokhu nendlela umsebenzi obewuhlelwe ngayo ngaphambili - ekhaya, ngejubane lomndeni ngokwawo. Lokhu kubeka indleko yobuntu esilayidini esilandelako.

slides.heading: Amalahle, insimbi neendlela zezitimela
slides.lead: Iimboni ezitjha nezokuthutha ezitjha zondlana begodu zarhatjheka kilo yoke iBrithani.

blocks.text: Iinjini zesitimu bezitlhoga **amalahle**, imitjhini neentraka bezenziwe **ngensimbi** kwathi ngokukhamba kwesikhathi ngesitili, begodu **iindlela zezitimela** zesitimu bezithutha koke lokho ngokurhabako enarheni yoke. Ngo-1830 kwavulwa iLiverpool and Manchester Railway, kutjengisa bona abantu nezinto bezingakhamba msinya kangangani nje.

items: Ukumbiwa kwamalahle nokwenziwa kwensimbi kwakhula kwaba ziimboni ezikhulu.
Iindlela zezitimela nemisele yamanzi bezihlanganisa imigodi, iimfemtri, amadorobho namatheku.
Iinkepe zesitimu bezithutha izinto zeBrithani - beziletha neenthako ezingakalungiswa - embusweni woke.

image.alt: Isitimela sesitimu eentrakeni sidonsa iinkoloyi zamalahle sidlula isignali.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#efe7d8'/><rect y='118' width='240' height='42' fill='#8c7a5c'/><rect x='30' y='70' width='60' height='42' rx='5' fill='#7a1f1f'/><rect x='36' y='52' width='16' height='18' fill='#5c1414'/><circle cx='44' cy='44' r='9' fill='#cfc3ad' opacity='0.8'/><rect x='96' y='84' width='40' height='28' fill='#3f342a'/><rect x='142' y='84' width='40' height='28' fill='#3f342a'/><circle cx='46' cy='116' r='9' fill='#2f2a24'/><circle cx='78' cy='116' r='9' fill='#2f2a24'/><circle cx='112' cy='116' r='8' fill='#2f2a24'/><circle cx='158' cy='116' r='8' fill='#2f2a24'/><rect x='20' y='124' width='200' height='5' fill='#4a4033'/><rect x='206' y='70' width='6' height='42' fill='#5a4a37'/><circle cx='209' cy='72' r='6' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Tjengisa ukusabela okuhlangeneko: isitimu sitlhoga amalahle, imitjhini neentraka kutlhoga insimbi, iindlela zezitimela zithutha zombili begodu zivula iimmaraga emitjha. Kungakho abalandi bomlando bakubiza nge'rhevholusjeni' - itjhuguluko linye labangela elinye. Veza isihlanganiso sombuso (iinkepe zesitimu norhwebo) ngombana sihlanganisa ngokunqophileko nokobana kubayini iBrithani yandisela eendaweni ezinjengeSewula ye-Afrika.

slides.heading: Ukwakheka kwamadorobho: ukukhula kwamadorobho amakhulu
slides.lead: Iimfemtri zadonsa inengi labantu elikhulu elisuka emakhaya iya emadorobheni akhula ngokurhabako.

blocks.text: **Ukwakheka kwamadorobho** kutjho ukukhula kwamadorobho namadorobho amakhulu njengombana abantu bafudukela kiwo. Njengombana iimfemtri zivulwa, iimndeni yatjhiya amasimu iyokufuna umsebenzi, begodu amadorobho anjenge-Manchester ne-Birmingham akhula msinya khulu. Izindlu, amanzi nokuhlwengeka bekungakghoni ukukhamba nawo.

items: Abasebenzi baminyana ezindlini ezirhwaphako, ezimtjhingako eduze neemfemtri.
Ukuminyana nokungahlwengeki okumbi kwarhatjha amalwelwe.
Okokuthoma, iinarha ezinengi bezinabantu abanengi abahlala emadorobheni kunalabo abahlala emakhaya.

image.alt: Iimigca yezindlu ezimtjhingako eziminyeneko ezinemitjhingayo eziqophelene khulu.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#efe7d8'/><rect y='126' width='240' height='34' fill='#8c7a5c'/><g fill='#7a5a3a'><rect x='16' y='78' width='34' height='48'/><rect x='54' y='70' width='34' height='56'/><rect x='92' y='80' width='34' height='46'/><rect x='130' y='68' width='34' height='58'/><rect x='168' y='82' width='34' height='44'/><rect x='206' y='74' width='28' height='52'/></g><g fill='#3f342a'><rect x='24' y='60' width='7' height='18'/><rect x='62' y='52' width='7' height='18'/><rect x='138' y='50' width='7' height='18'/><rect x='176' y='64' width='7' height='18'/></g><g fill='#cdd6b5'><rect x='26' y='92' width='12' height='14'/><rect x='64' y='86' width='12' height='14'/><rect x='102' y='94' width='12' height='14'/><rect x='140' y='84' width='12' height='14'/><rect x='178' y='96' width='12' height='14'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza ukwakheka kwamadorobho ngokukghanyako ngombana ligama eliqakathekileko le-CAPS begodu libuyela lokha nasiqala iSewula Afrika. Linganisa isithombe: amadorobho anikela umsebenzi neemholo, kodwana amadorobho wokuthoma wezimboni bekaminyene begodu angakaphili kuhle. Buza abafundi bona idorobho labo namkha idorobho eliseduze lakhula ngebanga lemisebenzi - hlanganisa umqondo nephaseni labo.

slides.heading: Itjhuguluko lemiphakathi neembonelo zokusebenza
slides.lead: IRhevholusjeni yadala umnotho omkhulu kwabanye kwathi kwabanengi yaletha umsebenzi obudisi, oyingozi.

blocks.text: Abanikazi beemfemtri nabarhwebi banotha, kwaba khona **isigaba esiphakathi** esitjha. Kodwana abasebenzi abanengi - kubandakanya abafazi nabantwana - basebenza amahora amade eemfemtrini nemigodini eyingozi ngokobana babhadelwe kancani. Ngokukhamba kwesikhathi, abasebenzi bakha **imibumbano yabasebenzi** balwela imithetho yokubavikela.

items: Abantwana basebenza eemfemtrini nemigodini, begodu abanengi balimala. [SME] Qinisekisa naziphi na iminyaka ethileko namkha iimbalobalo ngaphambi kokusebenzisa.
Abenzi bomtjhuguluko baphumelela imithetho enciphisa amahora wokusebenza nokusebenza kwabantwana.
Umphakathi wahlukana khudlwana waba sigaba esinothileko esinamafa nesigaba sabasebenzi.

image.alt: Isikali silinganisa isikhwama seemali nomuntu osebenzako, sitjengisa ukungalingani.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#efe7d8'/><rect x='106' y='30' width='8' height='96' fill='#5a4a37'/><rect x='70' y='30' width='80' height='6' fill='#5a4a37'/><line x1='78' y1='36' x2='78' y2='70' stroke='#5a4a37' stroke-width='3'/><line x1='142' y1='36' x2='142' y2='58' stroke='#5a4a37' stroke-width='3'/><circle cx='78' cy='80' r='16' fill='#e8a13a'/><text x='78' y='85' font-size='14' text-anchor='middle' fill='#5c3a10'>R</text><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='142' cy='66' r='8'/><rect x='136' y='74' width='12' height='20'/></g><rect x='70' y='126' width='80' height='6' fill='#4a4033'/></svg>

slides.notes: Kuphathe ngokuzibophezelako: iphuzu kukuthi ukwenziwa kwezimboni kwaletha ithuthuko nobudisi ngesikhathi sinye. Gandelela imbangela nomphumela - iimbonelo ezimbi zaholela abasebenzi ekubumbeni imibumbano nokuphuqela imithetho yetjhuguluko. Iflege ye-[SME] itshwaya imininingwana yomsebenzi wabantwana: yenze ibe ngokuvamileko ngaphandle kokobana umbuyekezi anikele iminyaka namkha iimbalobalo eziqinisekisiweko. Umbono lo wesigaba esinothileko esinamafa nesigaba sabasebenzi udlulela ngokunqophileko emigodini yeSewula Afrika.

slides.heading: Iimvumbulelo netjhuguluko eBrithani

blocks.alt: Ilandelano lezikhathi leemvumbulelo eziqakathekileko zeRhevholusjeni Yezimboni ukusukela ngabo-1760 ukuya ku-1840.

events.label: James Watt uthola ilungelo lomthetho lenjini yakhe yesitimu ethuthukisiweko
I-power loom yenza ukuluka kube ngokwemitjhini
Indlela yokuthoma yezitimela zesitimu yomphakathi (Stockton ukuya eDarlington)
IBrithani ilamandla wezimboni ahamba phambili ephasini

slides.notes: Sebenzisa ilandelano lezikhathi ukuqinisa ingcenye yeBrithani yesihloko ngaphambi kokuwelela eSewula ye-Afrika. Buza abafundi bona babone iphetheni: imitjhini yamalaphu kokuthoma, bese amandla wesitimu, bese iindlela zezitimela ezithutha koke. Tjheja bona amalanga la yiindawo zetjhuguluko eziqikelelweko, kunalokho angesizo iimehlakalo eziqakathekileko kwaphela. [SME] Umbuyekezi kufuze aqinisekise amalanga anembileko ngokuvumelana nelandelano leemvumbulelo ze-SAHO ngaphambi kokuphrinda.

slides.heading: Kubayini iRhevholusjeni yafika eSewula ye-Afrika
slides.lead: IBrithani yezimboni beyitlhoga iinthako ezingakalungiswa, iimmaraga emitjha nabasebenzi abarhwaphako - yaqala emakolonini wayo.

blocks.text: Iimfemtri zeBrithani bezitlhoga **iinthako ezingakalungiswa** ezinjengekotini, uboya beemvu neensimbi, begodu abarhwebi bayo bebafuna **iimmaraga emitjha** yokuthengisa izinto ezilungisiweko. Lokhu kwabangela iBrithani bona yandise umbuso wayo, kubandakanya eSewula ye-Afrika. Kwathi lapha kufunyanwa amadayimani bese kuba negolide, lokho kudonsa kwaba namandla khulu.

items: Umnotho wezimboni bewutlhoga iinthako ezingaphiwa makoloni.
Imali yeBrithani nemitjhini kwangena ukumba nokwakha iindlela zezitimela.
Lokhu kanengi kubizwa nge-**Rhevholusjeni Yamaminerali** eSewula Afrika.

slides.notes: Hlanganisa iingcenye ezimbili zesihloko ngokukghanyako. Amandla afanako aenza iBrithani yaba nezimboni - indlala yeenthako ezingakalungiswa, iimmaraga nenzuzo - abumba kabutjha iSewula ye-Afrika. Yethula i-'Rhevholusjeni Yamaminerali' njengebizo lendawo letjhuguluko lezimboni elirhabako leSewula Afrika, eliqhutjhwa kukumba kunamalaphu. Le yindawo eqakathekileko yesifundo.

slides.heading: Amadayimani nokumbiwa kweKimberley
slides.lead: Ukufunyanwa kwamadayimani kwatjhugulula isifunda esithulileko saba lidorobho lokumba elikhulako phcede ngobusuku bunye.

blocks.text: Ukusukela ngo-1867 amadayimani afunyanwa eduze nemilambo i-Orange ne-Vaal, kwathoma ukubaleka okukhulu eduze nalapho okwaba yiyo **iKimberley**. Iinkulungwana zabambi zamba **iBig Hole** edumileko. Ngo-1888 **uCecil John Rhodes** wahlanganisa imigodi ngaphasi kwenkampani yakhe, i-**De Beers Consolidated Mines**, wathola ukulawula inengi lamadayimani wephasi loke.

items: IKimberley yakhula yaba lelinye lamadorobho amakhulu eSewula ye-Afrika.
Abambi abancani basuswa njengombana iinkampani ezinothileko zithatha.
Abasebenzi abanzima bebahlaliswa emakhampomini avaliweko begodu babhadelwa okuncani khulu kunabasebenzi abamhlophe.

image.alt: Umgodi ovulekileko odephileko onamathala oyensethe nefanele, kunabantu abancani ngaphezulu.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#efe7d8'/><rect y='40' width='220' height='24' fill='#b7a17a'/><path d='M10 64 L210 64 L150 150 L70 150 Z' fill='#6b5236'/><path d='M28 64 L192 64 L140 132 L80 132 Z' fill='#7a5f40'/><path d='M48 64 L172 64 L128 112 L92 112 Z' fill='#8a6d49'/><path d='M70 64 L150 64 L118 96 L102 96 Z' fill='#5a4630'/><g fill='#3f342a'><rect x='40' y='54' width='4' height='10'/><rect x='96' y='54' width='4' height='10'/><rect x='160' y='54' width='4' height='10'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: IKimberley siyisibonelo sokuthoma esikghanyako seRhevholusjeni Yamaminerali. Imibono emikhulu emibili: ukubaleka kwadala idorobho elikhulu lezimboni ngaphakathi enarheni, begodu ukulawula kwadlulela msinya kusuka kubambi abancani abanengi kuya eenkampanini ezimbalwa ezinamandla ezirholwa nguRhodes. Yethula ihlelo lekhampomu nelabasebenzi abafudukako kancane lapha; islayidi esilandelako siyalithuthukisa. [SME] Qinisekisa ukuhlelwa kwe-Eureka (1867) ngokumadaniswa ne-Kimberley 'New Rush' (1871) nakutlhogeka amalanga anembileko.

slides.heading: Igolide eWitwatersrand
slides.lead: Ukufunyanwa kwegolide ngo-1886 kwadala iJohannesburg begodu kwenza iSewula Afrika yaba sesenta somnotho wephasi.

blocks.text: Ngo-1886 kwafunyanwa umthapho omkhulu wegolide e**Witwatersrand**, begodu idorobho lokumba i**Johannesburg** lavela ngeenyanga ezimbalwa. Igolide beyilele phasi ngaphasi komhlaba, ngalokho ukuyimba bekutlhoga imitjhini ebizako, iinkampani ezikhulu nabasebenzi abanengi khulu.

items: IJohannesburg yaba lidorobho elikhula ngokurhabako khulu eSewula ye-Afrika.
Ukumba okudephileko bekutlhoga imali enengi, ngalokho izindlu zokumba zakhula zaba namandla khulu.
Igolide lenza iSewula Afrika yaqakatheka eBrithani nakiwo woke umnotho wephasi.

image.alt: Umbhoshongo omude wemitjhini yomgodi onevili elisongako ngaphezu komgodi, kunelitje legolide ngaphasi.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 160' role='img'><rect width='200' height='160' fill='#efe7d8'/><rect y='130' width='200' height='30' fill='#8c7a5c'/><path d='M70 130 L86 40 L114 40 L130 130 Z' fill='none' stroke='#5a4a37' stroke-width='6'/><line x1='78' y1='90' x2='122' y2='90' stroke='#5a4a37' stroke-width='5'/><line x1='74' y1='60' x2='126' y2='60' stroke='#5a4a37' stroke-width='5'/><circle cx='100' cy='40' r='14' fill='none' stroke='#3f342a' stroke-width='5'/><rect x='150' y='108' width='16' height='12' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect x='158' y='96' width='16' height='12' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Madanisa amadayimani negolide. Amadayimani bekangathathwa esiphandeni ekuthomeni; igolide yeWitwatersrand beyidephile begodu inezinga eliphasi, ngalokho kusukela ekuthomeni beyitlhoga imitjhini esindako, imigodi edephileko nemali enengi. Kungakho iinkampani zokumba ezinamandla nabasebenzi abanengi khulu bavela msinya kangaka. IJohannesburg siyisibonelo esikghanyako khulu seSewula Afrika sokwakheka kwamadorobho okuqhutjhwa zizimboni.

slides.heading: Abasebenzi abafudukako, amakhampomu namadorobho amatjha
slides.lead: Imigodi yatjhugulula lapho nendlela abantu beSewula Afrika ebebahlala begodu basebenza ngayo.

blocks.text: Imigodi beyitlhoga inengi labasebenzi elirhwaphako. Amadoda anzima amanengi bekakhamba ibanga elide asuka eemphandeni ukuyokusebenza emigodini iinyanga ngesikhathi sinye - ihlelo **labasebenzi abafudukako** - kukuthi iimndeni yawo isele emuva. Abasebenzi bahlala **emakhampomini** aminyeneko, babhadelwa iimholo eziphasi begodu bekufuze bathwale **amaphasi** abelawula ukukhamba kwabo.

items: Iintela nokulahlekelwa mhlaba kwaphuqela amadoda amanengi weemphandeni bona afune umsebenzi wemigodini.
Ukwahlukaniswa ngokobuhlanga emiholweni nezindlini kwakhiwa ehlelweni lokumba.
Ukuhlangana kwabasebenzi abafudukako nokulawula ngokobuhlanga kwabumba iSewula Afrika isikhathi eside ngemva kwaka-1900.

image.alt: Umugca wabasebenzi abakhamba baya eenakhiweni zomgodi, bathwele imithwalo.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#efe7d8'/><rect y='124' width='240' height='36' fill='#8c7a5c'/><rect x='150' y='60' width='70' height='64' fill='#6b5236'/><rect x='160' y='74' width='16' height='16' fill='#cdd6b5'/><rect x='188' y='74' width='16' height='16' fill='#cdd6b5'/><g fill='#3f342a'><circle cx='34' cy='78' r='10'/><rect x='27' y='90' width='14' height='34'/><circle cx='70' cy='74' r='10'/><rect x='63' y='86' width='14' height='38'/><circle cx='106' cy='80' r='10'/><rect x='99' y='92' width='14' height='32'/></g><g fill='#7a5a3a'><rect x='22' y='70' width='10' height='10'/><rect x='60' y='66' width='10' height='10'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi silayidi esizwelako khulu - sethule ngeqiniso nangokutjheja. Umnotho wamaminerali awuzange udale umnotho namadorobho kwaphela; wadala ihlelo labasebenzi abafudukako, amakhampomu, iimholo eziphasi ngokobuhlanga nokulawulwa kwamaphasi okwabangela ubudisi bamambala nokuhlukanisa iimndeni. Yenza isihlanganiso nengcenye yeBrithani: njengombana abasebenzi beBrithani baqalana neembonelo ezibudisi nomphakathi ohlukeneko, umnotho wemigodi weSewula Afrika wakhiqiza ukungalingani okudephileko - lapha okuhlelwe ngokweemugca zobuhlanga. Lokhu kuhlanganisa nangaphambili neenhloko ezizako zokuhlukaniswa ne-apartheid.

slides.heading: IBrithani neSewula ye-Afrika kumadaniswa
slides.lead: Amandla afanako wezimboni akhiqiza iintjhuguluko ezifanako eendaweni ezimbili ezihlukene khulu.

items: Kuqhutjhwa sisitimu, amalahle neemfemtri zamalaphu.
Amadorobho anjenge-Manchester akhula msinya.
Isigaba esiphakathi esitjha nesigaba sabasebenzi.
Kuqhutjhwa kukumba amadayimani negolide.
Amadorobho anjenge-Kimberley neJohannesburg akhula msinya.
Abanikazi bemigodi abanothileko nabasebenzi abafudukako abahlukaniswe ngobuhlanga.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa islayidi esieqadi nezeqadi ukuveza ikghono le-CAPS lokumadanisa. Ukufana: ukukhula okurhabako kwezimboni, amadorobho akhula msinya, ukwahlukana okukhulu kwemiphakathi hlangana nabanikazi nabasebenzi. Umehluko oqakathekileko: eSewula Afrika ukwahlukana loko kwahlelwa ngobuhlanga, begodu abasebenzi bebafuduka khulu. Yenza abafundi baphakamise ukufana kunye nomehluko munye ngamezwi wabo ngaphambi kobana uveze iikholomu.

slides.heading: Esikufundileko
slides.lead: Isitimu neemfemtri kwatjhugulula iBrithani; amadayimani negolide kwadonsa iSewula Afrika ngephakathi ephasini elifanako lezimboni.

blocks.text: IRhevholusjeni Yezimboni yathutha umsebenzi ngephakathi eemfemtrini eziqhutjhwa mitjhini, yazalisa amadorobho ngabantu, begodu yahlukanisa umphakathi waba banikazi nabasebenzi. Isidingo seBrithani seenthako neemmaraga, ndawonye nokufunyanwa kwe-**amadayimani** ne-**golide**, kwaletha itjhuguluko lezimboni elirhabako eSewula Afrika ngendlela ye-**Rhevholusjeni Yamaminerali**.

blocks.question: Hlathulula bona injini yesitimu yatjhugulula njani indlela izinto ebezenziwa ngayo eBrithani.
Chaza iindlela ezimbili ukufunyanwa kwamadayimani negolide okwatjhugulula ngazo ipilo eSewula ye-Afrika.
Nikela indlela yinye itjhuguluko lezimboni ebeliyifana ngayo eBrithani neSewula ye-Afrika, nendlela yinye ebelihluke ngayo.

slides.notes: Phetha ngokubuyela embuzweni wesihloko: itjhuguluko eBrithani lafinyelela njani eSewula ye-Afrika? Buyekeza umketjezo - isitimu neemfemtri, ukwakheka kwamadorobho, ukwahlukana kwemiphakathi, bese amandla afanako afika lapha ngokumba. Sebenzisa imibuzo emithathu njengomsebenzi otloliweko namkha ipiskiswano; ukwabelwa kwamamaki kulandela iindlela ze-CAPS ezisekelwe emithonjeni nokutlola okukhambisako. Khumbuza abafundi bona isihloko lesi sibeka umsebenzi ozako wokwandiswa kwekoloni, iPi yeSewula Afrika nokuhlukaniswa.
